description: Viz.js (@viz-js/viz) — Graphviz compiled to WASM/JS. Shared by the offline PlantUML engine (task 87) AND the graphviz renderer (task 94). Relocated out of vendor/plantuml/ into its own neutral dir so the two consumers don't couple through PlantUML's folder (task 144 item 6).
artifact: js-plantuml-1.2026.6.zip (viz-global.js is shipped inside the PlantUML TeaVM bundle; byte-identical to the snapshot copy — same @viz-js/viz)
license: MIT — viz-global.js (@viz-js/viz, © Michael Daines). License text vendored as LICENSE.
notes: Loaded as a <script> (window.Viz) before plantuml.js. Ships to media/vditor/dist/js/viz/viz-global.js; both plantuml-render.ts and graphviz-render.ts load it from there.
